name: Off-cycle landing surface
description: Onboarded company used by off-cycle.spec.ts to assert payroll-landing tabs and either the pay-period column or the blocker fallback. The two consuming tests don't actually drive an off-cycle payroll, don't read employees/paySchedule/payrollIds from ScenarioContext, and don't assert processed history — so the previous 'one processed regular payroll' decoration is removed. The runner could never satisfy that decoration anyway because the demo company is missing tax/W-4/SSN data, so the calculate step always 422'd with payroll_blocker:missing_forms and the runner skipped the rest of processPayroll.
